creator: eng@prowip.net.br
text:
I get this problema actually less with releng_6 (as from this days) but it is 
still existent.
This problem seems to be specific to onboard NIC on Gigabyte and ECS MicroATX 
Motherboards with S939 and S754. I tried latest Bios Upgrades but no change.

HM







A mensagem foi scaneada pelo sistema de e-mail e pode ser considerada segura.
Service fornecido pelo Datacenter Matik  https://datacenter.matik.com.br
